channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 11 Natural Ways to Reduce Your Cortisol Levels
Venetoclax (Venclyxto) Expands Treatment Options as Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia Care Moves Further from Chemotherapy
item.description: The European Commission has approved expanded venetoclax combinations for untreated chronic lymphocytic leukemia, marking a shift away from chemotherapy.

item.title: Common Walking Mistakes (and How to Fix Them)
item.description: Walking is a low-impact exercise, but incorrect shoes, pace, or routine can hinder progress and potentially cause injury.

item.title: Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
